texts.content:
Riverside Cafe — Breakfast Menu
Served 7:00 AM – 11:00 AM daily

Farmhouse Breakfast — $14.95
Two eggs any style, bacon or sausage, toast, hash browns

Avocado Toast — $12.50
Sourdough bread, smashed avocado, cherry tomatoes, poached egg

Buttermilk Pancakes — $11.00
Stack of three pancakes with maple syrup and fresh berries

Continental Breakfast — $8.50
Croissant, butter, jam, fresh fruit cup, orange juice

Coffee, tea, or hot chocolate included with any breakfast item.
Substitute gluten-free toast: add $2.00.

questions.stem: What is the most expensive breakfast item on the menu?
options: A. Avocado Toast
B. Farmhouse Breakfast
C. Buttermilk Pancakes
D. Continental Breakfast
questions.explanation: The Farmhouse Breakfast costs $14.95, which is the highest price on the menu.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the beverage policy?
options: A. Coffee and tea cost extra for Continental Breakfast customers
B. A hot drink is included with every breakfast order
C. Only hot chocolate is offered free of charge
D. Beverages are not included with the Avocado Toast
questions.explanation: The menu states 'Coffee, tea, or hot chocolate included with any breakfast item,' meaning a beverage is complementary regardless of which item is ordered.

questions.stem: What does 'substitute' in 'substitute gluten-free toast' most likely mean?
options: A. To remove an item from the meal
B. To replace one item with an alternative
C. To add an extra item to the order
D. To reduce the portion size
questions.explanation: In this context, 'substitute' means to replace the regular toast with a gluten-free alternative at an additional cost.

texts.content:
City Parks Department — Volunteer Application

Thank you for your interest in volunteering! Please complete the following:

Available Positions (select one):
☐ Trail Maintenance — physical outdoor work; must be able to lift 30 lbs
☐ Visitor Information Desk — indoor; customer service focus
☐ Educational Program Assistant — must be available weekends
☐ Garden Crew — planting, weeding, watering

Availability (check all that apply):
☐ Weekday mornings   ☐ Weekday afternoons
☐ Weekend mornings    ☐ Weekend afternoons

Commitment: We ask volunteers to commit to at least 4 hours per week for a minimum of 3 months.

Age requirement: Volunteers must be at least 16 years old.

Training: All new volunteers attend a one-day orientation session before starting.

questions.stem: What is the purpose of the volunteer application form?
options: A. To recruit volunteers for the parks department
B. To provide safety training information
C. To collect feedback on park maintenance
D. To advertise paid positions at the city
questions.explanation: The form is titled 'Volunteer Application' and collects availability, position preferences, and commitment details for volunteer roles in the parks department.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the volunteer commitment?
options: A. Volunteers can choose their own hours without any minimum
B. The program expects a regular weekly commitment over several months
C. Volunteers must commit to at least one full day per week
D. The commitment period is flexible and can be adjusted monthly
questions.explanation: The form asks for 'at least 4 hours per week for a minimum of 3 months,' indicating a consistent, long-term commitment is expected.
